findings.description: heuristic.test.ts imports makeChunk from shared helpers but re-defines a local makeSlackChunk wrapper with a different default source value (#general vs #foc-support in __test-helpers.ts). While this is an allowed composition pattern per AC-US5-03, it could cause confusion.
findings.impact: Minor DRY concern. Two makeSlackChunk definitions exist with different default source values.
findings.recommendation: Add a comment explaining why the local variant uses a different default, or import makeSlackChunk from __test-helpers.ts and override source.

fixed: F-001: Added server.once('error', reject) to startServer Promise
F-003: Added ownership header to heuristic.test.ts
F-004: Added ownership header to extractor.test.ts
F-001: Added server.removeListener('error', reject) after successful listen
F-002: Added ownership header to llm.test.ts
